<!-- Thanks for contributing to OpenPitch! -->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change, and why? Link any related issue (e.g. Closes #123). -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / source / tool
- [ ] Data correction (note: fix the source/seed, not `data/*.json` directly)
- [ ] Docs / chore

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest -q` passes locally
- [ ] `ruff check .` passes
- [ ] Non-trivial logic has a test or runnable self-check
- [ ] No secrets committed; no paid/auth-walled sources added (see `docs/DATA-POLICY.md`)
